title: Dedsafio Tools 3
description:
DTools3 is a plugin that provides you with the necessary tools to make your Dedsafio 3 style event a success!

No mods or datapacks!
body:
# Server Discord
[https://discord.gg/jKeUAftMgS](https://discord.gg/jKeUAftMgS)

# ResourcePack v1.1.0 Download?
[Click here.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QpnnbyLt/versions/iYlhuJTw/DTools3%20Resourcepack%201.1.0.zip)

# SlotMachine Model Download?
[Click here.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QpnnbyLt/versions/EPoHjzrW/SlotMachine%20Model.zip)

# Mod Client Side v1.20.1 & 1.19.2
[Click here.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QpnnbyLt/versions/9E9mxyXH/DTools3%20Mod%20Forge.zip)

## Are you working on an event project?

Do you want it to have a variety of things like certain streamer events such as **Dedsafio 3**?

You are in the right place!
This plugin will allow you to take your event server to another level by having so many tools for your server, each tool is modifiable to the smallest so you can create different things having the base of one of the biggest events like **Dedsafio 3**! 

On top of that, you can use it without Datapacks or Mods, only on servers that support plugins and a resourcepack!

which contains the plugin:

**Icons:**
These icons are about a way to replace the unicodes by a more understandable message, since this is a resource-pack all the symbols are strange and sometimes confusing, so I created the icons for this, The format is as follows `:icon_id:`.
You can use them in your texts or commands and even with PlaceholderAPI to display them in other places that allow them.

**States:**
- **Join**: This state allows you to customize commands or messages when a player joins your server.
- **Leave**: This state allows you to customize commands or messages when a player leaves your server.
- **Sun**: This state allows you to enable or disable sunburn, so prepare your sunscreen, messages and custom commands too!
More coming soon (depends on which ones exist).

**Deaths:**
- Allows you to send messages, commands and sounds with different types of deaths or have all deaths use the same one, at the same time you can customize messages when you popeam a totem or different types of totems!

Events:
- **Otter Moment/Reviil Moment**: will send the otter animation when this event is activated in turn you can also send messages or commands and sounds.

**Roulette:**
- Allows you to show everyone or a specific player a specific or random roulette depending on the probability set!
- Roulette wheels can execute commands, send messages or execute other tools such as events to use the otter moment event or reviil moment, among other things.

**Items:**
You can set a display name, lore, CustomModelData and other properties for items. You can create as many as you want but there are some types of items.

- **NONE**: This type will make the item a simple item with no special actions.
- **HEALTH**: This type will make the item allow you to heal yourself depending on the amount of hearts you want it to heal.
- **ENDER_CHEST**: This type will make that interacting with the right click will open your ender chest.
- **SUN_BLOCK**: This type will give you sunblock effects to block the sun's rays so you don't get burned.

## **NOTE**: 
If you have suggestions, criticisms or there is something that does not go according to the main event please let me know to fix it as soon as possible.

## **Credits**:
- **ItsSoS** for roulette, otter moment and reviil moment textures.
- **Walky** for giving me context about the special items and mechanics like the sun.
